mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fund_join ( user_id, join_number, fund_id, fund_name, join_amount, payment_method, status, join_date, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{joinNumber}, #{fundId}, #{fundName}, #{joinAmount}, #{paymentMethod}, #{status}, #{joinDate}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT join_id as joinId, user_id as userId, join_number as joinNumber, fund_id as fundId, fund_name as fundName, join_amount as joinAmount, payment_method as paymentMethod, status, join_date as joinDate, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM fund_join WHERE join_number = #{joinNumber}

SELECT join_id as joinId, user_id as userId, join_number as joinNumber, fund_id as fundId, fund_name as fundName, join_amount as joinAmount, payment_method as paymentMethod, status, join_date as joinDate, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM fund_join WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY join_date DESC

SELECT join_id as joinId, user_id as userId, join_number as joinNumber, fund_id as fundId, fund_name as fundName, join_amount as joinAmount, payment_method as paymentMethod, status, join_date as joinDate, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM fund_join WHERE user_id = #{param1} AND status = #{param2} ORDER BY join_date DESC
